batch_summary.note: 1 primary RF-15 flag(s). See primary_flags for details.

primary_flags.summary: Alcoholism fabrication. Mar 28 2026. ROW-15498: 'Is this the problem? Do you have a drinking problem? If you are trying to convince her to come with you is showing up and asking her to get in a vehicle with you while you smell of beer a good way to convince her?' Category B (distorted incident weaponized into pattern allegation): Eli confirmed one beer with dinner before pickup; Olivia noted breath smell; Eli acknowledged it. Clean record — no DUI, no substance history. Melissa converts single documented minor incident into 'drinking problem' pattern allegation. Sev-2: distortion is deliberate pattern framing, not genuine concern (clean record documented). Phase C ADD-002 active.
primary_flags.exact_quote: ROW-15498: 'Do you have a drinking problem? ...showing up...while you smell of beer'
primary_flags.cross_rf_note: RF-04 B-030 RF04-B030-006 Sev-2 primary flag. RF-15 primary: Category B alcohol distortion.
